transactions.description: Pittsburgh Pirates placed 1B Spencer Horwitz on the 10-day injured list. Left hamstring strain.
Athletics placed 3B Zack Gelof on the 10-day injured list retroactive to June 24, 2026. Right hand contusion.
Houston Astros optioned LHP Colton Gordon to Sugar Land Space Cowboys.
Atlanta Braves optioned RHP JR Ritchie to Gwinnett Stripers.
Houston Astros recalled LHP Colton Gordon from Sugar Land Space Cowboys.
Philadelphia Phillies optioned RHP Max Lazar to Lehigh Valley IronPigs.
Baltimore Orioles sent RHP Dean Kremer on a rehab assignment to Norfolk Tides.
New York Yankees optioned RHP Jake Bird to Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders activated RHP Jake Bird.
Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders activated RHP Eric Reyzelman from the 7-day injured list.
Syracuse Mets sent RHP Robert Stock on a rehab assignment to Brooklyn Cyclones.
